text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the first day of summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: Not so good with the heat?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm not. I suppose it serves as a chance to
improve my stamina, though.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
With a little more, I could push myself even
further...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: So don't hold back. Let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus marks the beginning of my last summer
camp with Silence Suzuka.
